pages.text: $(bold)Cocoa Pod Seed$()$(br2)Three cocoa beans pressed into a pod. Grows the jungle's cocoa-bearing tree.
pages.title: Cocoa Pod Seed

pages.text: $(bold)Make:$() 3× $(italic)Cocoa Beans$() → this seed (shown as a Cocoa Pod).$(br2)$(bold)Convert:$() + $(italic)Dirt$() → $(italic)Jungle Sapling$() — cocoa belongs to the jungle family.
pages.title: Planting & Catalyst
